conservative.name: Fury of Ulric
conservative.requirements: 3 favour available immediately. Play this blessing when you are struck by a Melee Attack, before damage is applied

success.description: The rage of Ulric fills you and fortifies you against pain. Move up to 2 recharge tokens from your recharging Ulric Blessings, Melee Attacks or Active Defences to this card and increase your Soak value against this attack by the same amount
As above, but up to 3 tokens instead
As above, but up to 4 tokens instead
